utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 items appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: specified as Prague, Czech Republic — complete. 2) travel_dates: specified as October 15-19, 2024 — complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — includes airline name, flight numbers, routes, times, total cost €85 — complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — Eco Lodge Prague, 5 nights, €90/night, €450 total, includes amenities — complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — lists multiple activities with individual prices and totals (€55), also includes transport pass and train with costs — complete. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs — provides restaurant recommendations with price ranges and a confirmation code; although not a booked service, it includes costs — acceptable as specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — provides total and line items (€85 flights + €450 accommodation + €55 activities) and remaining budget — complete. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify items in the final package that match entries in the ground-truth ratings and map to their exact rating numbers. Additional_services lists restaurants only; no extra hotel/general services chosen.
